---
title: "__init__.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/__init__.py"
loc: 29
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.75
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 6.92
overall_score: 5.06
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating _apply_pydantic_v1_patch, patched_set_default.

## Interaction Protocol
Import _apply_pydantic_v1_patch and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [warnings](file://warnings)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `_apply_pydantic_v1_patch`
- `patched_set_default`
